title: BGMSync
description: Background Music Sync: all players have synced music, perfect for group sessions
body:
Welcome to **BGMSync**, also known as Background Music Sync! This is my first mod, so please let me know if you have any issues. I mainly made this for my own group, after failing to find an equivalent online. It should work with most music mods, so fire away! This works by selecting one player as the "DJ", and all passive music that plays for them is initiated for everyone else. All other players should never have music playing that isn't from the DJ. There's a few commands:
- "/bgmsync who" will show who is the DJ.
- "/bgmsync test" will start up a random track for testing purposes.
- "/bgmsync set <player>" will change the DJ to <player>.
- "/bmgsync stop" will halt all currently playing music.
